questionHtml: State the conclusion of the test. Justify your answer.
markschemeHtml:
99%>5%          R1

 

EITHER

so there is insufficient evidence to reject H0.         A1

 

OR

we accept that the number of sightings follows a Poisson distribution          A1

 

Note: Do not award R0A1.

A p-value must be seen in part (f) to award FT.

 

[2 marks]
